name: Successful Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining Host
notes: This rule triggers when a successful communications to a cryptocurrency mining host is detected. This could indicate a machine infected by a malware or a misuse of a corporate asset.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining IP
BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Events
BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Flows
BB:Threats: X-Force Premium: Internal Connection to Host Categorized as Cryptocurrency Mining
BB:Threats: X-Force Premium: Internal Host Communication with Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Events
BB:Threats: X-Force Premium: Internal Host Communication with Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Flows
conditions_text: when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication, BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept

when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining IP, BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Flows, BB:Threats: X-Force Premium: Internal Connection to Host Categorized as Cryptocurrency Mining, BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Events, BB:Threats: X-Force Premium: Internal Host Communication with Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Events, BB:Threats: X-Force Premium: Internal Host Communication with Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Flows
TD_list: APPLY Successful Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication, BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept

AND when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining IP, BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Flows, BB:Threats: X-Force Premium: Internal Connection to Host Categorized as Cryptocurrency Mining, BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Events, BB:Threats: X-Force Premium: Internal Host Communication with Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Events, BB:Threats: X-Force Premium: Internal Host Communication with Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Flows
RED_list: Event name: Successful Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining Host
Event description: A successful communication to a cryptocurrency mining destinations has been detected.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
